# PRIONATION.io
> Production AI infrastructure for European & US-based mid-market companies.
> Fixed scope. Fixed price. Lean pods. 8 weeks from signed to shipped.

## What we do
PRIONATION.io builds production AI products that break operational bottlenecks
for mid-market companies (EUR 5-50M revenue, 30-300 employees).

We are not a consultancy. We are an AI product engineering foundation.
We ship in 8 weeks. Clients own the code, the infrastructure, and the data.

## Pricing
- Diagnostic: EUR 5,000-7,000 · 2 weeks · Maps the bottleneck
- Build: EUR 25,000-55,000 · 8 weeks · Ships production AI
- Retainer: EUR 4,000-9,000/month · min. 6 months · Ongoing pod access
- Express Site: EUR 1,500 base · 5 business days · 3-page Next.js site

## Methodology
1. Evals before features — test suite before the prompt
2. Telemetry from day one — production data drives the next iteration
3. Owned infrastructure — client holds the keys: code, hosting, data, models
4. Lean pods, fixed clocks — 2-3 engineers, 8-week delivery unit

## Key metrics
- Diagnostic to Build conversion: >=60%
- Time to first deliverable: 2 weeks
- Time to production: 8 weeks
- Post-launch warranty: 4 weeks
- Response time: within 24h

## Core pages
- [How We Work](https://www.prionation.io/en#how-we-work): Pod vs hire model
- [Methodology](https://www.prionation.io/en#methodology): Engineering principles
- [Pricing](https://www.prionation.io/en#pricing): Fixed SKU structure
- [Selected Work](https://www.prionation.io/en#selected-work): Epidom, Expeditoo, The Lead Agent
- [Foundation](https://www.prionation.io/en#foundation): The team and how we operate
- [Connect](https://www.prionation.io/en#engage): Start a Diagnostic

## Markets
European Union and United States. Mid-market companies.
Headquartered in Bali, Indonesia. Managed remotely.

## Contact
consult@prionation.io — response within 24 hours
